bluetooth.label: Bluetooth Connectivity
bluetooth.description: USB-C + Bluetooth dual connectivity. Requires Bluetooth Consortium licensing ($12k).
bluetooth.notes: Cannot advertise until licensing fee paid

custom-profiles.label: Custom Profiles
custom-profiles.notes: Coming soon — waiting on app development

alternatives: Engage the Agility of Your Feet.

sub.primary: The world's first analog dual foot controller for PC gaming and VR. 16 additional actions. Zero extra fingers required.

tagline.primary: Engage the agility of your feet.

product.primary: Fully configurable analog foot controller for video games and virtual reality. Assembled in Texas.

_instructions.how_to_add_tagline: Add new entries under taglines.<category>.alternatives. They'll be available for use across the site and brand kit.
_instructions.how_to_schedule_feature: Set activateDate to an ISO date string (e.g. '2025-08-01') and change status to 'scheduled'. The site JS will auto-show elements with the matching CSS selector on that date.
_instructions.how_to_activate_now: Set activateDate to today's date or earlier and status to 'active'.
_instructions.statuses: active = live now | scheduled = has future date | planned = no date yet | blocked = cannot activate (legal/tech/budget)
